piu_project_locations_adm3.title: Ethiopia PIU Project Locations - ADM3
piu_project_locations_adm3.snippet: World Bank-supported Ethiopia PIU project locations joined to FCV-modified ADM3 woreda polygons.
piu_project_locations_adm3.description: Project-location polygons derived from the PIU survey export and matched to Woredas_FCVModified/Eth_Admin3_v2.shp. One feature represents one project in one ADM3 area. Rebuild the GeoJSON with scripts/build_piu_adm3_locations.py before publishing.

kobo_project_woreda_points.title: Ethiopia Kobo Project Woreda Centroids
kobo_project_woreda_points.snippet: Kobo project submissions matched to FCV-modified ADM3 woredas and represented as woreda centroid points.
kobo_project_woreda_points.description: Deduplicated project-woreda centroid point layer derived from KoboToolbox submissions. One feature represents one project in one matched ADM3 woreda. Repeated submissions for the same project and woreda are aggregated into selection_count and submission_count attributes. Use project_label or project_code for ArcGIS Online symbology.

ethiopia_fcv_admin3_boundaries.title: Ethiopia FCV-Modified Admin 3 Boundaries
ethiopia_fcv_admin3_boundaries.snippet: Ethiopia FCV-modified administrative level 3 woreda boundary polygons.
ethiopia_fcv_admin3_boundaries.description: Administrative level 3 woreda boundary polygons generated from data/admin_boundaries/Woredas_FCVModified/Eth_Admin3_v2.shp. Blank placeholder records from the shapefile are excluded.

ethiopia_conflict_classifications_adm3_2.title: Ethiopia Conflict Classifications - ADM3 - 2025
ethiopia_conflict_classifications_adm3_2.snippet: Ethiopia ADM3 woreda conflict classifications for the complete Jan-Dec 2025 period.
ethiopia_conflict_classifications_adm3_2.description: ADM3 polygon layer generated from the conflict-app Ethiopia classification service for period 202501_202512 (Jan 2025 - Dec 2025), the most recent complete 12-month calendar-year period available from the local ACLED data. Classifications use ACLED battle-related deaths excluding Protests and Strategic developments, joined to FCV-modified ADM3 woreda boundaries. Key fields include status_label, status_code, conflict_affected, highly_conflict_affected, violence_affected, acled_brd_total, event_count, death_rate_100k, and period metadata.
ethiopia_conflict_classifications_adm3_2.license_info: Source: ACLED. Review ACLED terms before redistributing beyond authorized World Bank/GeoHub users.

ethiopia_drought_summary_2020_2025.title: Ethiopia Drought Conditions Summary 2020-2025
ethiopia_drought_summary_2020_2025.snippet: Summary grid of Global Drought Observatory RDRI drought classes for Ethiopia, 2020-2025.
ethiopia_drought_summary_2020_2025.description: One feature per Ethiopia 1-degree drought grid cell, summarized from 216 decadal Global Drought Observatory RDRI rasters for 2020-2025. Source rasters were clipped in place to the Ethiopia admin-1 boundary dissolved from data/admin_boundaries/boundaries_1.geojson. Key fields include max_class, latest_class, modal_class, drought_periods, moderate_periods, severe_periods, first_drought, last_drought, trend, and annual maximum and persistence counts. Source copyright: European Union, 1995-2026. Licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International.
ethiopia_drought_summary_2020_2025.license_info: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0). Source: European Union / European Commission Global Drought Observatory.

ethiopia_humanitarian_access_adm3.title: Ethiopia Humanitarian Access - ADM3
ethiopia_humanitarian_access_adm3.snippet: Latest OCHA Ethiopia humanitarian access status joined to FCV-modified ADM3 woreda boundaries.
ethiopia_humanitarian_access_adm3.description: ADM3 polygon layer built from the latest XLSX resource in the HDX Ethiopia - Humanitarian Access dataset and joined to data/admin_boundaries/woredas_fcvmodified_adm3.geojson on ADM3 p-code. Rebuild with scripts/downloads/download_humanitarian_access.py before publishing. Current source edition: April 2026, resource ETH_National Access Map Data_ April 2026.xlsx, modified 2026-05-06.
ethiopia_humanitarian_access_adm3.license_info: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0). Source: OCHA Ethiopia / HDX Ethiopia - Humanitarian Access.

ethiopia_mfr_health_facilities.title: Ethiopia MFR Health Facilities
ethiopia_mfr_health_facilities.snippet: Ethiopia Ministry of Health Master Facility Registry health facility coordinates joined to FCV-modified ADM3 boundaries.
ethiopia_mfr_health_facilities.description: Point layer built from the public Ethiopia Ministry of Health Master Facility Registry XLSX export at https://mfrv2.moh.gov.et/#/facility/all. Facility geometry uses the source Longitude and Latitude fields. Admin attributes are assigned by spatially joining coordinates to data/admin_boundaries/woredas_fcvmodified_adm3.geojson. Rebuild with scripts/downloads/download_mfr_health_facilities.py before publishing.
ethiopia_mfr_health_facilities.license_info: Source: Ethiopia Ministry of Health Master Facility Registry.

ethiopia_market_centers.title: Ethiopia Market Centers
ethiopia_market_centers.snippet: Ethiopia market center point locations from HDX.
ethiopia_market_centers.description: Point layer built from the current CSV resource in the HDX Ethiopia - Market Centers dataset. Coordinates use the source x/y fields. Source administrative fields from HDX are retained; no local admin boundary join is applied. Rebuild with scripts/downloads/download_market_centers.py before publishing.
ethiopia_market_centers.license_info: Public Domain / No restrictions (CC0). Source: HDX Ethiopia - Market Centers.

ethiopia_basins.title: Ethiopia River Basins
ethiopia_basins.description: River basin boundary polygons from data/basins/basins.geojson. One feature represents one basin.

ethiopia_subbasins.title: Ethiopia River Subbasins
ethiopia_subbasins.description: River subbasin boundary polygons from data/basins/subbasins.geojson. One feature represents one subbasin and includes parent basin attributes where available.

ethiopia_agro_climate_regions.title: Ethiopia Agro-Climate Regions
ethiopia_agro_climate_regions.description: Agro-climate region polygons derived from data/basins/agro_climate_regions.geojson and simplified to data/basins/agro_climate_regions_agol.geojson for ArcGIS Online publishing. One feature represents one agro-climate class.

ethiopia_ookla_speedtest_fixed_2026_q1.title: Ethiopia Ookla Speedtest Fixed Tiles 2026 Q1
ethiopia_ookla_speedtest_fixed_2026_q1.snippet: Ethiopia-clipped fixed broadband Speedtest by Ookla performance tiles for Q1 2026.
ethiopia_ookla_speedtest_fixed_2026_q1.description: Polygon layer built from Speedtest by Ookla Global Fixed and Mobile Network Performance Maps. Source fixed broadband tiles were downloaded from the public AWS Open Data bucket and clipped in place to the dissolved Ethiopia admin-1 boundary from data/admin_boundaries/boundaries_1.geojson. Metrics are quarterly averages for Q1 2026 at zoom level 16 web mercator tile resolution, represented in EPSG:4326.
ethiopia_ookla_speedtest_fixed_2026_q1.license_info: Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). Source: Speedtest by Ookla Global Fixed and Mobile Network Performance Maps.

ethiopia_ookla_speedtest_mobile_2026_q1.title: Ethiopia Ookla Speedtest Mobile Tiles 2026 Q1
ethiopia_ookla_speedtest_mobile_2026_q1.snippet: Ethiopia-clipped mobile cellular Speedtest by Ookla performance tiles for Q1 2026.
ethiopia_ookla_speedtest_mobile_2026_q1.description: Polygon layer built from Speedtest by Ookla Global Fixed and Mobile Network Performance Maps. Source mobile cellular tiles were downloaded from the public AWS Open Data bucket and clipped in place to the dissolved Ethiopia admin-1 boundary from data/admin_boundaries/boundaries_1.geojson. Metrics are quarterly averages for Q1 2026 at zoom level 16 web mercator tile resolution, represented in EPSG:4326.
ethiopia_ookla_speedtest_mobile_2026_q1.license_info: Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). Source: Speedtest by Ookla Global Fixed and Mobile Network Performance Maps.
